title: Arijit Singh Live: One Night Only
description: Experience the soul-stirring voice of Arijit Singh live in concert. A night filled with magic, melody, and emotions.

title: Sunburn Goa 2024
description: The biggest electronic dance music festival in Asia is back! Join thousands for a three-day celebration of music and life.

title: Diljit Dosanjh: Born to Shine Tour
description: Diljit Dosanjh is set to rock Mumbai with his high-energy performance and soulful Punjabi hits.

title: Coldplay: Music of the Spheres
description: Coldplay returns to India for a spectacular night of lights, music, and unforgettable memories.

title: Anirudh Ravichander: Hukum Tour
description: Rockstar Anirudh is coming to Chennai! Get ready for a high-octane musical extravaganza.

title: Lollapalooza India 2025
description: The global festival giant returns with an incredible lineup of international and local artists.

title: Prateek Kuhad: The Way That Lovers Do
description: The king of Indie pop is back in Bengaluru for an intimate evening of beautiful stories and songs.

title: Sid Sriram: All Love No Hate Tour
description: Experience the divine voice of Sid Sriram as he blends traditional Carnatic with modern R&B.

title: Nucleya: Bass Rani Tour
description: Get ready for the Raja of Bass! Nucleya is bringing the heat to Bengaluru with his signature beats.

title: Jubin Nautiyal: Soulful Journey
description: Join Jubin Nautiyal for a night of soulful Bollywood hits that will touch your heart.

title: Alan Walker: Walkerworld Tour
description: The masked producer Alan Walker brings his spectacular Walkerworld show to the City of Pearls.

title: Shreya Ghoshal: Live in Concert
description: The Nightingale of India, Shreya Ghoshal, returns to her home city for a magical night.

title: The Local Train: Farewell Tour
description: Catch The Local Train one last time as they perform their greatest hits in an emotional farewell.

title: Post Malone: India Tour
description: Global superstar Post Malone makes his highly anticipated India debut this November.

title: Kailash Kher: Kailasa Live
description: Experience the powerful Sufi-folk fusion of Kailash Kher and his band Kailasa.
